added.statement: The Home Manager source and hermetic repository check shall preserve the requested fj and fast-Nix toolchain, remove tea, and own the nix-index and dotfiles-update timers.
acceptance_criteria: home.packages includes forgejo-cli, nix-fast-build, nh, comma, nix-diff, nix-du, nurl, and nix-index while excluding tea
home/home.nix imports the nix-index module and the periodic update timers evaluate
the Nix dev shell supplies node, python, and nix-fast-build so just check does not depend on a prior Home Manager activation
just check runs one canonical repository check path and builds without a repository result symlink

ears.response: provide the requested Forgejo and fast-Nix tools without tea through a hermetic check and Home Manager activation

breaker.condition: the repository check passes while a requested package is absent, tea is restored, or the check relies on ambient node, python, or nix-fast-build

added.statement: The combined Home Manager generation shall retain the landed repo-memory MCP hook contract and install the native Cursor and Copilot hook files without duplicating Codex's system-managed hooks.
acceptance_criteria: the existing shared hook and configuration contract tests remain green
the activation package contains Cursor, Copilot, Claude, Kimi, and Codex hook surfaces owned by Home Manager
live Cursor and Copilot hook files exist after activation while Codex hooks.json stays empty and /etc/codex/requirements.toml remains the sole managed lifecycle-hook authority
a live MCP swarm post, poll, delayed ack, and status readback succeeds through the activated hook client

ears.precondition: the combined Home Manager generation is activated
ears.response: expose durable repo-memory swarm messages through each supported client's native hook contract

breaker.condition: the combined generation omits a client hook, acknowledges a message in its delivery boundary, or creates a second managed Codex hook authority

test_plan.description: Node static contract test for the requested package set, removed tea, module/timer wiring, hermetic dev-shell tools, and canonical repository check path.
Existing hook transport and Home Manager configuration tests plus live activated-generation inspection.
test_plan.command: nix develop path:. --command node --test scripts/test-swarm-messages.mjs scripts/test-swarm-hook-config.mjs

commands: nix develop path:. --command node --test scripts/test-swarm-messages.mjs scripts/test-swarm-hook-config.mjs
